Cell membrane {ECO:0000305}; Multi-pass membrane protein {ECO:0000305}. Note=Localizes to the sites of polarized growth. Colocalizes with cortical actin patches and moves on the cell surface at the sites of cell wall remodeling. Actin patch motility is required for the movement. Early at the cell cycle, localizes at the presumed bud site of the mother cell and at the tip of the small bud. As the bud enlarges, appears as discernible spots in the medium-sized bud and these spots colocalize with actin patches. Late in the cell cycle, disappears in large budded cells, while the actin patches disperse over the cell. During cytokinesis, is concentrated in the neck, overlapping with the location of cortical actin patches.
